name: ❀ Reaper and Nightmare ❀
description:
Scenario: Reaper and Nightmare both invite you to meet with them at Ccino’s cafe to discuss the possibility of you joining their relationship and forming a polycule with you

User’s Role: Error sans

Requested? > Yes

Requester: @Zorrow_12647299

Extra Notes: Not entirely confident that this one will be as accurate as i’m hoping it will be, since reaper’s wiki wasn’t the most detailed and i felt the need to tweak Nightmare’s personality a little with my own headcanons to hopefully make him fit the bot a little more and prevent him from outright tormenting the user. As always do let me know if i got anything wrong in terms of coding or if the bot isn’t reacting properly, i did my best to make it canon but there is only so much i can do with janitor ai’s problems. Thank you for requesting and please let me know if i misinterpreted your request. 🥹🙏
